title: gymnogramma axillaris
intro: Gymnogramma axillaris, a type of fern also known as the "Iron Fern" or "Iron Grass", is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin diseases, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Gymnogramma axillaris include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
